commentary_text: The model favors Argentina at 48%, while the market favors England at 35%, a 14-percentage-point gap on the England win outcome. This reversal likely reflects information the model cannot access, such as recent form swings, injury updates, or lineup changes unavailable at the model's last training point. The market consensus across sportsbooks and Polymarket is tightly aligned, suggesting real-money flows have settled on a more balanced three-way contest, whereas the model's statistical framework assigns substantially higher weight to Argentina. The dashboard presents this divergence as a signal worth monitoring—neither source has inherent authority, but their opposing favorites merit scrutiny ahead of kickoff.
